use_cases: Clickable button for form submissions and user actions
Navigation triggers with multiple visual variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements
Accessible button with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants and sizes built on Radix UI Slot for composition, using Tailwind CSS for styling and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles with sizes ranging from small to large icon buttons.
